title: FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS - 211info
text: OPTIONS COUNSELING AND FAMILY SERVICES SALEM FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides parent skills training, help accessing community resources, home management, and support services. 2645 Portland Road NE Suite 120 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Families may be referred by DHS Self Sufficiency Case Manager or self refer via Options website Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm (503) 390-5637 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 390-5637 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Must have referral from ODHS Self-Sufficiency Case Manager FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Referral documents LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Marion, Polk, and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-6:30pm, Saturday 9am-4:30pm Services: Child Abuse Prevention Child Abuse Support Groups Parenting Skills Classes Specialized Information and Referral * Parenting Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING APPROACHES - MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING AND PSYCHIATRY INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - IN-HOME SAFETY AND REUNIFICATION SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING CLASSES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OPTIONS COUNSELING AND FAMILY SERVICES SALEM
